questions: > Ticket GT-1-MULT — no plan recorded yet; running `feature-plan` and resuming.

> 2. Abort — stop before any edits are proposed

> Ticket GT-1-MULT — running tests: targeted first (`--filter` on the changed paths), full suite only if targeted passes.
